name: Trent -- A value unlocking story from the house of TATA

posts.author: Jugal_Doshi
posts.community: Trent -- A value unlocking story from the house of TATA
posts.text: SSGS remains weak (flat). 47 new cities for Zudio in a single quarter. Management keeps talking about growth & opportunity for Star. However, results dont reflect anything good. Star remains an insignificant player, with little to no growth. Company has approved bonus & rights issue of Rs. 2500 Cr. Company is now repeatedly talking about COCO stores, meaning significant investments in fixed assets.Still 2500 Cr? Anyone tracking? Any views?
